[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010110110 5
1 1001001010 4
2 0111100111 7
3 1111011111 9
4 1010111111 8
5 0101110001 5
6 1111111111 a
7 1111101100 7
